evals.prompt: Review the last commit (9506322) which changes customer-timeline-service.js and customer-portal-service.js to use kunde_name instead of kunde_id for Supabase queries.
evals.expected_output: Structured review of the commit diff identifying the getLifecycleSummary bug, validating schema correctness, and noting name-based query fragility.

assertions.name: has-critical-section
assertions.description: Output contains '### Critical Issues' heading

assertions.name: has-bugs-section
assertions.description: Output contains '### Bugs & Logic Errors' heading

assertions.name: has-suggestions-section
assertions.description: Output contains '### Suggestions' heading

assertions.name: has-positive-notes
assertions.description: Output contains '### Positive Notes' with at least one positive finding

assertions.name: has-verdict
assertions.description: Output contains exactly one of APPROVE, REQUEST CHANGES, or NEEDS DISCUSSION as verdict

assertions.name: schema-verified
assertions.description: References config/sql/supabase-schema.sql or confirms kunde_name exists (not kunde_id)

assertions.name: lifecycle-bug-found
assertions.description: Identifies that getLifecycleSummary() does not pass customer to getTimeline()

assertions.name: line-numbers-present
assertions.description: At least 3 findings reference specific line numbers (e.g., 'line 42', ':42', 'L42')

assertions.name: fix-suggestions-present
assertions.description: At least 2 findings include a concrete fix suggestion (contains 'Fix:' or 'fix' with code)

assertions.name: no-formatting-nitpicks
assertions.description: Does NOT contain words like 'indentation', 'whitespace', 'JSDoc', 'docstring', 'type annotation'

evals.prompt: Security audit of auth-service.js and security-service.js before opening beta access to real users.
evals.expected_output: Security-focused review identifying rate limiting gap, password validation gap, CSRF dead code, and session validation issue.

assertions.name: reads-auth-service
assertions.description: References auth-service.js with specific line numbers or method names (login, register, resetPassword)

assertions.name: reads-security-service
assertions.description: References security-service.js with specific line numbers or method names (checkRateLimit, sanitizeInput, validateCSRFToken)

assertions.name: rate-limiting-gap
assertions.description: Identifies that checkRateLimit exists but is never called from auth flows

assertions.name: password-validation-gap
assertions.description: Identifies missing or weak password strength validation on registration

assertions.name: session-validation-issue
assertions.description: Identifies getSession() vs getUser() issue (reads from storage without server verification)

assertions.name: positive-notes-present
assertions.description: Acknowledges at least 2 good security patterns (e.g., crypto.getRandomValues, escapeHtml, Supabase auth delegation)

assertions.name: verdict-present
assertions.description: Contains exactly one of APPROVE, REQUEST CHANGES, NEEDS DISCUSSION

assertions.name: actionable-fixes
assertions.description: At least 3 findings include concrete fix suggestions with code snippets or specific method calls

evals.prompt: Review store-service.js and db-service.js focusing on offline sync correctness, race conditions, and data loss risks.
evals.expected_output: Architecture-level review identifying dual sync paths, data overwrite risk, missing conflict resolution, and sync queue issues.

assertions.name: dual-sync-identified
assertions.description: Identifies that store-service and db-service have independent sync mechanisms that don't coordinate

assertions.name: data-overwrite-risk
assertions.description: Identifies that _syncFromSupabase overwrites local data (this.store[table] = ...) potentially losing offline changes

assertions.name: sync-queue-issue
assertions.description: Identifies at least one sync queue issue (no cleanup, no backoff, retry problems)

assertions.name: template-followed
assertions.description: Uses all 5 required sections: Critical Issues, Bugs & Logic Errors, Suggestions, Positive Notes, Verdict

assertions.name: verdict-present
assertions.description: Contains exactly one of APPROVE, REQUEST CHANGES, NEEDS DISCUSSION

assertions.name: no-framework-suggestions
assertions.description: Does NOT suggest React, Vue, Angular, or other framework migration

assertions.name: line-numbers-present
assertions.description: At least 3 findings reference specific line numbers

assertions.name: positive-notes-non-empty
assertions.description: Positive Notes section contains at least 2 positive observations about the code
